name: xyOps
description: A complete task scheduler and server monitoring system with workflow automation, multi-server management, real-time monitoring, and a built-in satellite agent (xySat) for running jobs on remote servers.

notes.text: A local xySat satellite is started automatically alongside the conductor, allowing jobs to run on this server right away.
The WebSocket port 5523 is used for secure wss:// connections. Port 5522 serves the web interface and ws:// connections.
